features: Original HP Toner Cartridge ‚Äì exceptional reliability and consistent print quality
For use with: HP LaserJet Pro M201/M125/M127/M225
Recycle HP Original Cartridges for free with HP's Planet Partners Programme - 100 percent of Original HP Toner Cartridges contain recycled content
description: Product Description This HP 83A Black toner cartridge has been precisely created to deliver quality and reliable printing results. This is done by working harmoniously with HP paper and your HP printer. Over 50 Percent of the printing technology of your HP printer is contained within the cartridge itself; meaning every time you replace your toner cartridge you are installing a brand new print engine. After being used, HP products can be recycled with HP (see pack for instructions). Dowload pre-paid postage labels from the HP website to return used products for recycling. This toner cartridge is compatible for use with the HP LaserJet Pro M201/MFP M125/MFP M127/MFP M225 printers. The page yield is: 1500 per cartridge. "Page yield" refers to an estimated yield reached by an industry-standard calculation. However, a number of other factors can affect page yield (e.g. printer, printer settings, types of pages printed and page content) so this number is not guaranteed and should be taken as a guide only. Legal Disclaimer Product is sourced and shipped from the European Economic Area (EEA). Product is genuine original from manufacturer authorised distributors. Manufacturer's Description Excellent Toner Cartridge designed for the busy office environment which requires reliable, professional print results on a day to day basis. Specifically designed to ensure print quality with crisp output from the first page to the last. Easy to install cartridges, provide cost-effective, reliable operation and sharp, professional results every time. Box Contains 1 x HP 83A Black Original LaserJet Toner Cartridge (CF283A) Manufacturer Contact Information https://www.hp.com/uk-en/home.html See more
